debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝² : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
p_large_enough : Fact (p > 512)
programSize : ℕ
inst✝¹ : NeZero programSize
program : Fin programSize → F p
h_programSize : programSize < p
memorySize : ℕ
inst✝ : NeZero memorySize
memory : Fin memorySize → F p
h_memorySize : memorySize < p
⊢ GeneralFormalCircuit.Completeness (F p)
    (Examples.FemtoCairo.femtoCairoStepElaboratedCircuit p inst✝² p_large_enough programSize inst✝¹ program
      h_programSize memorySize inst✝ memory h_memorySize)
    (Examples.FemtoCairo.femtoCairoAssumptions p)

    fetchInstructionCircuit, decodeInstructionCircuit, readFromMemoryCircuit, nextStateCircuit]
  simp only [femtoCairoAssumptions]
  aesop

intro input h_assumptions
  have h_fetch := fetchInstructionCircuit.completeness program h_programSize input.pc (by
    simp_all only [gt_iff_lt, id_eq]
    omega)
  have h_decode := decodeInstructionCircuit.completeness program (input.pc + 0) (by
    simp_all only [gt_iff_lt, id_eq]
    have := Spec.fetchInstruction program input.pc
    cases this <;> simp_all
    omega)
  have h_read1 := readFromMemoryCircuit.completeness memory h_memorySize
    { state := input, offset := _, mode := _ } (by
      simp_all only [gt_iff_lt, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Fin.ofNat_eq_cast]
      intro addr h_addr
      cases h_addr <;> simp_all
      omega)
  have h_read2 := readFromMemoryCircuit.completeness memory h_memorySize
    { state := input, offset := _, mode := _ } (by
      simp_all only [gt_iff_lt, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Fin.ofNat_eq_cast]
      intro addr h_addr
      cases h_addr <;> simp_all
      omega)
  have h_read3 := readFromMemoryCircuit.completeness memory h_memorySize
    { state := input, offset := _, mode := _ } (by
      simp_all only [gt_iff_lt, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Fin.ofNat_eq_cast]
      intro addr h_addr
      cases h_addr <;> simp_all
      omega)
  have h_next := nextStateCircuit.completeness { state := input, decoded := _, v1 := _, v2 := _, v3 := _ }
    (by
      simp_all
      exact Spec.computeNextState_isSome_of_valid_transition)
  exact ⟨_, _, _, _, _, h_fetch, h_decode, h_read1, h_read2, h_read3, h_next⟩
